base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_raven_fly — a character (playable) from 1986 castlevania. Raven — 2-frame wing-flap. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Raven — 2-frame wing-flap; perches then swoops at Simon; Level 3 Tower
